**Source:** https://news.sap.com/2025/08/extend-sap-s4hana-cloud-right-way-clean-clear/
**Date checked:** 2026-05-20
**Confidence:** high
**Related page/topic:** /ai/integration-reliability/
**Practical implication:** Teams using AIF should review whether the new dashboards reduce manual monitoring effort.
**Tags:** sap-ams, integration, aif

<h2>SAP AIF monitoring improvements</h2>

<p>SAP released improved AIF message monitoring dashboards with filtering by interface, status, and partner. Export to CSV and scheduled alerting are now supported in the standard.</p>

<p>For AMS teams, this reduces the need for custom monitoring wrappers and makes interface health easier to communicate to business stakeholders.</p>

<p>Watch for: whether the alerting granularity is enough for multi-partner landscapes.</p>
